home.aboutTeaser: Bojan and Dalibor run Tara Flow — your guides through the untouched nature of Bosnia and Herzegovina. Specialized in rafting on Tara and Drina, ascents to Maglić, trips to Trnovačko Lake and Zelengora.
home.galleryDescription: Every trip is a story of its own. See the moments we captured on the river and in the mountains.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Meet the people behind Tara Flow adventures
about.heroSubtitle: Meet the people behind Tara Flow adventures
about.storyQuote: The river brought us together, the mountain built us.
about.storyText: Tara Flow was born from a love of the untouched nature of Bosnia and Herzegovina. Bojan and Dalibor, two friends from Foča, decided to share what they love most — the Tara River, Maglić mountain and all the beauty that surrounds their town. What started as a weekend adventure with friends grew into a mission — to bring people closer to nature and show them that BiH has one of the most beautiful wildernesses in Europe.
about.bojanBio: Bojan is a licensed rafting guide with more than 8 years of experience on the Tara River. Having grown up by the Tara, he knows every rapid, every rock and every hidden corner of the canyon. His passion for the river is contagious to every guest.
about.daliborBio: Dalibor is a certified mountain guide who has climbed every peak around Foča. Maglić, Zelengora, Trnovačko Lake — they are his second home. He leads groups with care, patience and infectious enthusiasm.
about.value1Text: Every tour is designed with respect for the environment. We leave nature more beautiful than we found it.
about.value2Text: Maximum 16 people per tour. Personalised approach and attention for every guest.
about.value3Text: Licensed guides, certified equipment and years of experience guarantee your safety.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of satisfied guests who have already experienced the magic of Tara.
about.missionText: To enable unforgettable experiences in the heart of nature — from adrenaline rafting to peaceful mountain trails, all with safety and professionalism

footer.description: Tara Flow — adventure tourism in the heart of nature. Rafting, hiking and unforgettable experiences on Tara and around Foča.

faq.q1: Do I need experience for rafting?
faq.a1: No. Our tours require no prior experience. We provide comprehensive training before departure.
faq.q2: What should I bring on a trip?
faq.a2: Comfortable outdoor footwear, change of clothes for varying weather, sun protection and good spirits. We send a detailed list before the tour.
faq.a3: Contact us via the form or email. We respond within 24 hours and arrange all details.
faq.a4: Depends on the tour. Usually: guide, equipment, transport from/to Foča, and where included — food or accommodation. Each tour has a detailed description.
